context: Tests whether the SensorKit skill keeps agents from overapplying SensorKit to ordinary consumer motion and health-data work.

checklist.name: Research restriction
checklist.description: States that SensorKit is not appropriate without an Apple-approved research study and entitlement.

checklist.name: Live motion
checklist.description: Routes live step counts, tilt, pedometer, gyroscope, or activity-recognition features to CoreMotion.

checklist.name: Workout data
checklist.description: Routes workout and heart-rate records or summaries to HealthKit.

checklist.name: No SensorKit buildout
checklist.description: Avoids giving SensorKit entitlement, reader, or fetch implementation steps for the non-research fitness app.
